description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The individual is dressed in a loose, short-sleeved top and knee-length cargo shorts, both of which appear casual and suited for everyday urban environments. The figure's feet are clad in flat slip-on shoes, and the legs are bare from the knee down. The hairstyle is short and voluminous, styled away from the face, giving a neat and practical appearance. The facial features are neutral, and the overall posture is upright and balanced. No accessories or carried objects are visible on the person.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a T-pose, wearing a short-sleeved top, cargo shorts, and slip-on shoes, with short, voluminous hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full frontal details of the clothing and footwear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the back of the shorts and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the shorts from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved top and knee-length cargo shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
